meta.title: Lavanderia Suvanet | Carpet and wall-to-wall carpet cleaning

hero.title: Professional carpet and wall-to-wall carpet cleaning
hero.description: Lavanderia Suvanet cleans, disinfects, and perfumes area rugs, wall-to-wall carpets, furniture, and curtains with industrial products and 20 years of experience.
hero.imageAlt: Clean carpet in a bright room after a professional washing service

hero2.title: Clean, disinfected carpets ready for use
hero2.description: We pick up your carpets, wash them at our workshop, and deliver them in approximately 3 to 5 days.

aboutTeaser.title: 20 years caring for homes and offices
aboutTeaser.description: At Suvanet we work with organized processes, industrial products, and direct service so every carpet, wall-to-wall carpet, or upholstered piece receives the right care.
aboutTeaser.point1: Specialists in area rugs and wall-to-wall carpets
aboutTeaser.point3: Free delivery after prior conversation and coordination
aboutTeaser.imageAlt: Office with a clean carpet and organized environment

servicesBlock2.title: Main services
servicesBlock2.description: Cleaning for area rugs, wall-to-wall carpets, furniture, and curtains in rooms, offices, and homes.
servicesBlock2.intro: We review the surface type, usage level, and material condition to apply a washing, disinfection, and perfuming process with industrial products.

ctaStrip.title: We coordinate the service around your carpet or space
ctaStrip.description: For area rugs, we pick up the piece, wash it, and coordinate delivery in approximately 3 to 5 days. Delivery can be free after prior conversation.

socialLinksBlock.title: Social media
socialLinksBlock.description: Follow us for work examples and updates.

servicesBlock.title: Cleaning for every need
servicesBlock.description: Frequent solutions to keep area rugs, wall-to-wall carpets, furniture, and curtains clean, disinfected, and fresh.

testimonialsBlock.title: Clients who back our work
testimonialsBlock.description: Our experience and client trust support the quality of our service.

contactBlock.title: Contact
contactBlock.description: Tell us what you need cleaned and we will coordinate the best way to help.

feedback.success: Message sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
